name: shomer-app
description: SH✡MER — Citizens for Citizens. Community safety app.

scripts.build: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap open ios
scripts.apk: npm run build && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.bundle: npm run build && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
